summary: Triaged and fixed the 3 fast-green failures carried since before 105A: a VALID_PREFLIGHT_STATUSES module-level name collision in core/backend_invocations.py (renamed the 94U constant to VALID_ADAPTER_PREFLIGHT_STATUSES), and TestBackendShow::test_show_missing_artifacts depending on accumulated local .pcae/backend-invocations/ state (isolated to tmp_path). Fast-green is now fully green: 4390/4390. pcae_doctor_task_memory clean. docs/RELEASE_SCOPE_V0_1.md updated. 22 tests added/updated. Recommends 106C.

phase_commits.message: Triage v0.1 release critical fast-green status

note: This metadata intentionally reflects pre-push state (pushed_status=not_pushed) at task-finish time; pcae push check correctly passes on content completeness regardless (105D design). A corrected complete dispatch follows after pcae push. All 3 previously pre-existing fast-green failures are now FIXED (not merely documented) -- fast_green is fully green, 4390/4390.
no_go_confirmation: No runtime enforcement. No autonomous execution. No real backend invocation. No adapter execution. No subprocess execution beyond existing lifecycle/test command behavior. No shell execution beyond existing lifecycle/test command behavior. No network call outside the existing Telegram outbound notification path. No shell interception. No Telegram inbound. No Telegram polling. No remote shell. No automatic apply. No apply execution. No patch parsing. No commit authorization changes beyond existing governed lifecycle. No push authorization changes beyond existing governed lifecycle. No real AI backend calls. No executable artifact-only invocation path. No execution enablement flag. No execution availability toggle. No cryptographic signing. No remote attestation. No database-backed audit storage. No shell mediation. No rollback execution. No file mutation rollback. No automatic restore. No git reset/checkout/revert execution. Telegram outbound-only. Execution unavailable. All auth flags False. v0.1 remains non-executing by design. v0.2 remains the autonomy target. Recommends 106C.
